summary: Full backend + frontend testing for Treborg Bygg site. 14/14 backend tests pass. Frontend flows (Home, Navigation, Services, ServiceDetail, Gallery+filters+lightbox+keyboard, About, Contact form submission, Admin list/filter/status update/delete, Mobile menu) all working end-to-end via REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL.

issues: data-testid for 'Om oss' mobile nav item is 'mobile-nav-om oss' (contains space) - desktop uses 'nav-om-oss' (with dash). Inconsistent testid pattern in Header.jsx line 121: missing .replace(/\s/g, '-') for mobile; only cosmetic for testing, link itself works.

action_items: (Optional, minor) Align mobile nav data-testid in /app/frontend/src/components/Header.jsx (line 121) to use same .replace(/\s/g, '-') as desktop (line 67) so 'Om oss' becomes 'mobile-nav-om-oss'.
(P2, noted in request) Admin route /admin is unprotected - add auth protection before production.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event('shutdown') - consider FastAPI lifespan handler.
POST /api/quotes returns 200 (FastAPI default) instead of 201 for resource creation - functional but not strictly REST-correct.
Mongo created_at is stored as ISO string then re-parsed to datetime on read; works but adds overhead - consider storing as native datetime.
Admin route has no auth - exposes all customer PII (email/phone/messages) to anyone hitting /admin (acknowledged P2).
Header.jsx mobile vs desktop data-testid generation inconsistent (missing whitespace replace on mobile).
Contact form does not enforce HTML5 email pattern strictly client-side but backend EmailStr catches it - works.
seed_data_creation: Test quote requests were created during testing and cleaned up via DELETE endpoint; no leftover data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_quotes.py covers all CRUD + validation. Frontend Swedish UI. Admin route currently unprotected (P2). All data-testid attributes present and working (one minor inconsistency in mobile nav 'om oss'). Quote API: POST/GET/PATCH/DELETE on /api/quotes. Status values: ny|kontaktad|klar. Validation: namn/email/meddelande required, email must be valid format -> 422; invalid status on PATCH -> 400; missing id on PATCH/DELETE -> 404.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. App functions as specified in problem statement.
